arcs.title: The Second Bookmark
arcs.summary: Steve has named the location aloud: Heron Shelf, forty miles east of Jellico, a rock formation overhanging a hollow large enough to stand in, accessed by a track that probably shouldn't still exist. Christine studied the only photograph for ninety seconds and asked about the gradient. He answered. The Adventure Desk considers departure imminent. Day 4 should cover the departure itself — or the morning of it — and what the shelf turns out to be when they arrive.

arcs.title: The Glowing Briefcase
arcs.summary: A new arc opens: the Ministry's luminous briefcase, previously classified 'not a concern,' has been reclassified 'under active review' with no explanation for what changed. It was seen near the Level Three lifts at half past four, glowing amber. Everyone who passed it felt it contained exactly what they'd been looking for. It has not been opened. Day 2 should deepen the mystery — perhaps it moves again, or someone attempts to open it, or its origins begin to surface.
